scripts.name: Mailbox Cleanup Script
scripts.description: Clear Recoverable Items for quota-blocked Exchange Online users under the 3-Year Retention Policy. Runs in ~6 minutes vs days with the legacy approach.

scripts.name: Shared Mailbox Repair Tool
scripts.description: Diagnose and fix shared mailboxes that keep disappearing from Outlook. Repairs or disables AutoMapping per mailbox with full ticket export.
